channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Detainees tell their lawyer an ICE officer shot a Houston driver through a passenger window
item.description: Three men who survived a fatal shooting involving federal immigration officers in Houston say no officer was threatened.

item.title: Meteorologists warn week ahead in US will have dangerous temps: ‘Heat is not to be played with’
Platner formally withdraws from Maine Senate race and Democrats announce process to name new nominee
